question: What port does the Deal Finder MCP service run on?
What IP address is the Chroma database running on?
What Ollama model does the spool processor use for summarization?
What machine runs Ollama and what is its IP address?
How much RAM does voldemort have?
What is the default model for MLX distributed inference?
What is the Gitea admin password?
What SSH port does Gitea use?
What cron schedule runs the spool processor?
What port does the Engineering RAG MCP server run on?
How do you start the MLX distributed inference server?
ground_truth: Run ~/.config/mlx/start-distributed-server.sh on voldemort, which bounces RDMA on both machines

question: What was the fix for the autosave document ID overwrite bug?
ground_truth: doc_id now includes checkpoint number, format: autosave_{hostname}_{session_id}_{checkpoint}

question: How does the circuit breaker work in the spool processor?
ground_truth: After 3 consecutive Ollama failures, exponential backoff starting at 10 minutes, doubling up to 60 min cap

question: What steps are needed to set up screen sharing on voldemort?
ground_truth: System Settings > General > Sharing > Screen Sharing ON

question: How was PersonaPlex converted to run on Apple Silicon via MLX?
ground_truth: Used moshi_mlx framework, converted weights, patched generate.py, lm.py, local.py for dep_q=16

question: What MCP services are deployed and on what machines?
ground_truth: Deal Finder on Docker LXC:8200, Engineering RAG on gargamel:8100, claude-mem Chroma on Docker LXC, MemPalace locally, home-assistant, proxmox, n8n

question: What are all the machines in the homelab with their Tailscale IPs?
What problems were encountered with the Amazon/AliExpress product scraping?
ground_truth: CAPTCHA blocked from datacenter IP for AliExpress, Amazon stock monitor uses curl with browser user agent to check availability

question: What custom patches were made to mlx_lm model files for tensor parallel support?
ground_truth: qwen3_moe.py shard function, qwen3_next.py shard with GatedDeltaNet skipped, chat template patches for thinking mode

question: Describe the full autosave pipeline from Claude Code session to Chroma storage.
ground_truth: context-autosave.js hook triggers at checkpoints, dumps transcript to ~/.claude-mem/spool/, cron runs spool-processor.py every 10 min, Ollama summarizes, stores in local Chroma, sync-to-remote.py pushes to Docker LXC Chroma
